title: These Silent Woods
author: Kimi Cunningham Grant
description: A heart-pounding novel about a father and daughter living in isolation and the secrets that threaten their world.

title: Foundations of Quantum Physics
author: Charles E. Burkhardt
description: A comprehensive textbook exploring the fundamental principles of quantum mechanics.

title: Architecture Patterns with Python
author: Harry Percival & Bob Gregory
description: Mastering domain-driven design and event-driven architecture using Python.

title: The CRISPR Revolution
author: Arvin M. Gouw & Ted Peters
description: An exploration of the scientific, religious, and ethical implications of gene-editing technology.

title: Deep Learning: A Visual Approach
author: Andrew Glassner
description: A non-mathematical guide to neural networks using intuitive visual explanations.

title: Midnight in Cairo
author: Raphael Cormack
description: A vibrant history of the divas and performers who shaped the nightlife of 1920s Egypt.

title: The Algorithmic Mind
author: Gari Johnson
description: Examining the human interface and how we adapt to life alongside artificial intelligence.

title: Foundations of Quantum Mechanics
author: Travis Norsen
description: An exploration of the physical meaning of quantum theory through historical and philosophical contexts.

title: Rites of the Starling
author: Devney Perry
description: A captivating fictional story focused on the complexities of small-town relationships.

title: Deep Learning Illustrated
author: Jon Krohn
description: A visual and interactive guide to artificial intelligence and deep learning networks.

title: Editing Humanity
author: Kevin Davies
description: The story of CRISPR and the new era of genome editing that is changing science forever.

title: The Presence
author: John Hart
description: A suspenseful mystery exploring trust, tragedy, and the unknown in a small community.
